---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of the problem or gap you've noticed. (e.g. "I wish there was a way to...")

## Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Who Would This Help?
Describe the type of church planter or user who would benefit from this feature.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any workarounds or alternative approaches?

## Additional Context
Any mockups, screenshots, or links that help illustrate the idea.
